candidate_definitions.text: Open source simulator for autonomous vehicles built on Unreal Engine / Unity, from Microsoft AI & Research

Microsoft and IAMAI collaborated to advance high-fidelity autonomy simulations through Project AirSim—the evolution of AirSim— released under the MIT license as part of a DARPA-supported initiative. IAMAI is proud to have contributed to these efforts and has published its versio…
